refnamediv.refpurpose: Segment an image from an initial contour mask.

refsynopsisdiv.title: Syntax
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis: mask = imsegactivecontour(image, initialMask) mask = imsegactivecontour(image, initialMask, iterations, smoothing)

listitem.para: Input grayscale or RGB image. RGB input is converted to grayscale.
Initial boolean or numeric mask with the same height and width as the image.
Number of majority-filter smoothing passes per iteration. Default is 1.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Uses a compact Chan-Vese-style region update to refine a binary initial mask from inside and outside intensity means.

refsection.title: Examples
